assertions.title: Vite Dev Server Proxies API Calls

steps.observed: Login form displayed with email, password, company code fields

steps.expected: API call proxied to backend, redirect to dashboard (200/401, no CORS error)
steps.observed: Successfully redirected to /hub — login API call was proxied through Vite dev server to backend without CORS errors
Received 403 response (session/auth issue, but confirmed proxy is forwarding to backend — not a CORS error)

steps.expected: Request proxied to backend on port 8081
steps.observed: Both localhost:3002 (Vite proxy) and localhost:8081 (direct backend) returned identical 403 responses, confirming proxy is forwarding correctly

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/login via Vite proxy -> proxied to backend -> 200 (browser login succeeded, redirected to /hub)

steps.expected: Separate portal-* chunks for each portal
steps.observed: 6 portal chunks found: portal-accounting (380KB), portal-admin (157KB), portal-dealer (60KB), portal-factory (153KB), portal-sales (178KB), portal-superadmin (97KB)

steps.expected: Separate vendor-* chunks for shared dependencies
steps.observed: 4 vendor chunks found: vendor-react (207KB), vendor-mz_7UtY1 (72KB), vendor-date (23KB), vendor-router (14KB)
14 separate files in dist/assets/ — proper code splitting confirmed

evidence.network: Build output: 6 portal-*.js chunks, 4 vendor-*.js chunks, 1 api-layer.js, 1 index.js, 1 index.css
evidence.buildOutput: portal-accounting-ufRBYolf.js (380.74KB), portal-admin-BesklHpA.js (157.23KB), portal-sales-COKQHUYk.js (178.11KB), portal-factory-jJ-aFxB4.js (153.23KB), portal-superadmin-CBp4m-XK.js (97.37KB), portal-dealer-CGZW_aU8.js (60.06KB), vendor-react-o9A5_2zb.js (207.47KB), vendor-mz_7UtY1.js (71.78KB), vendor-date-yVMm5hkH.js (22.95KB), vendor-router-_RL5RVL-.js (14.24KB)

steps.expected: 404 page or redirect to login/hub — not blank screen
steps.observed: Redirected to /hub (authenticated state) — hub page displayed with portal cards

steps.expected: Redirect to login page — not blank screen
steps.observed: Redirected to /login page with login form displayed

steps.action: Verify no blank screen in either case
steps.observed: Both cases showed meaningful UI — hub page (authenticated) or login page (unauthenticated)

evidence.network: SPA returns HTML shell for all routes; client-side router handles redirect to /hub (authenticated) or /login (unauthenticated)

summary: Tested 3 infrastructure assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-FOUNDATION-008: Vite dev server successfully proxies API calls to backend (login worked without CORS errors). VAL-FOUNDATION-009: Build produces proper code-split chunks with 6 portal-* and 4 vendor-* files. VAL-FOUNDATION-010: Dead routes (/nonexistent-portal) are handled gracefully — redirect to /hub when authenticated, /login when unauthenticated.
